overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic dystopian city street during golden hour. The scene features a striking contrast between weathered low-rise buildings and towering futuristic glass skyscrapers, with palm trees lining the sidewalk and sporadic pedestrian and vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with mixed commercial shacks and palm trees

events.description: pedestrian in red vest walks past camera on the left side
dark colored sedan drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past weathered storefronts and parked vehicles, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction wearing red vest and light pants
dark sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk casting long shadows
weathered wooden shacks and small commercial buildings with corrugated metal roofs
large black armored vehicle parked on the street side
tall geometric glass and steel tower dominating the skyline in the distance
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk lined with palm trees. Weathered low-rise shacks and storefronts line the left side while a large black truck is parked on the right. A pedestrian in a red vest passes by closely on the left, and the camera continues forward approaching an intersection with a futuristic skyscraper visible in the golden-hour haze.

events.description: transitioning from sidewalk onto the street intersection
crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection with a group of pedestrians, then turning right onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction as camera
car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to clear

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
storefront with bright purple and blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sidewalk into a wide street intersection, transitioning onto the crosswalk. The futuristic skyscraper looms larger in the center view while pedestrians cross alongside. After crossing, the camera turns right onto a new sidewalk section, passing a corner store with vibrant neon signage as the previous buildings fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with graffiti walls and street vendors

events.description: passing by a barber shop with rotating pole and a homeless encampment with tents

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing various storefronts, a barber shop, and street elements

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk in opposite direction wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: red white and blue rotating barber shop pole attached to building
large electronic advertisement screen mounted on building facade
makeshift shelter with tarps, cardboard, and wooden pallets on the sidewalk
wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the new sidewalk section, the camera passes a classic barber shop with a rotating pole on the left and a homeless encampment with makeshift tents on the right. A large digital billboard is visible in the distance while the futuristic skyscraper shifts to the left side of the frame. The environment shows urban decay mixed with commercial activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic signals and corner stores

events.description: crossing street at green pedestrian walk signal
turning right to continue down the next sidewalk section

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the green light and turning onto the next sidewalk, navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at street corner for signal to change
multiple cars driving through the intersection

entered.detail: pedestrian traffic signal displaying green walk symbol
storefront with green facade and red neon signage
prominent futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass surface and geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and crosses another street intersection, this time at a green pedestrian signal. The tall glass skyscraper dominates the center view with its reflective surface catching the golden hour light. After crossing, the camera turns right past a green-cornered storefront, continuing the urban exploration while the previous sidewalk elements fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a dystopian city street, transitioning from a sunlit residential strip of weathered shacks toward the towering presence of a reflective glass skyscraper. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and low-rise storefronts, passing a pedestrian in a red vest before moving forward into a wide street intersection. As the camera crosses the road, the view shifts from the golden-hour haze toward a corner store with vibrant neon signage, eventually leading past a classic barber shop and a makeshift homeless encampment. The scene then expands as the camera crosses a second intersection under a green signal, allowing the massive skyscraper to dominate the center frame with its reflective surface catching the light. Finally, the camera turns right past a green-cornered storefront, leaving the urban decay behind as it continues deeper into the city.
